DISCOVERY 302, RE: MOTION TO COMPEL PLAINTIFF S FURTHER RESPONSES TO SPECIAL INTERROGATORIES, SET TWO, AND REQUEST FOR SANCTIONS. NO APPEARANCE WAS MADE BY ANY PARTY, COUNSEL, OR INTERESTED PERSON. THE COURT ADOPTS ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS: DEFENDANT MILLER KELLEY ARCHITECTS, INC.'S MOTION TO COMPEL PLAINTIFF S FURTHER RESPONSES TO SPECIAL INTERROGATORIES, SET TWO, AND REQUEST FOR SANCTIONS IS GRANTED IN PART AND DENIED IN PART. SEE WORD MINUTES FOR COMPLETE RULING. A PROPOSED ORDER HAS BEEN SUBMITTED. JUDGE: JOSEPH M. QUINN. CLERK: R. WOODS. NOT REPORTED. (302/JMQ)

MOTION FOR LEAVE TO File First Amended Answer; Memorandum Of Points And Authorities In Support Thereof
Off Calendar Apr-27-2026 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Prior to Open Court, Consel for Plaintiff appears via Zoom. The Court did not receive any notice to contest the Court's Tentative ruling. The Court's tentative ruling becomes the final ruling of the Court.

No appearances in Open Court. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

1 - DEFENDANT MILLER KELLEY ARCHITECTS, INC. DOING BUSINESS AS MKTHINK, A CALIFORNIA CORPORATION MOTION FOR LEAVE TO File First Amended Answer.

Defendants' motion for leave to file a First Amended Answer is GRANTED. Plaintiff Betancort has not identified any "prior action" in which Defendants allegedly failed to assert the defense of setoff under CCP Section 431.20. This order is without prejudice to any challenges by Plaintiff to the legal and/or factual sufficiency of the newly-asserted affirmative defenses in the First Amended Answer.

Defendants shall file and serve their First Amended Answer on or before April 30, 2026.

A proposed order is submitted for the court's review and signature.

Judge: Richard C. Darwin, Clerk: M. Goodman, Not Reported. (302/RCD)

MOTION TO CONSOLIDATE ACTIONS OF CASE(S) CGC-26-634438 WITH CASE CGC-25-629608
Off Calendar Apr-27-2026 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Prior to Open Court, Consel for Plaintiff appears via Zoom. The Court did not receive any notice to contest the Court's Tentative ruling. The Court's tentative ruling becomes the final ruling of the Court.

No appearances in Open Court. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

2 - DEFENDANT MILLER KELLEY ARCHITECTS, INC. DOING BUSINESS AS MKTHINK, A CALIFORNIA CORPORATION, MARK MILLER MOTION TO CONSOLIDATE ACTIONS OF CASE(S) CGC-26-634438 WITH CASE CGC-25-629608.

The motion to consolidate filed by Plaintiffs Miller Kelley Architects, Inc. d/b/a MKThink, and Mark Miller is denied without prejudice. Should the complaint survive demurrer (or other challenges to the legal and/or factual sufficiency of the causes of action asserted therein), Plaintiffs may renew this consolidation motion.

A proposed order is submitted for the court's review and signature.

Judge: Richard C. Darwin, Clerk: M. Goodman, Not Reported. (302/RCD)
